gold_sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T3 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T3.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.WORKED_ON_FAMILY_FARM_INDICATOR = 1 OR T1.WORKED_IN_ANIMAL_CARE_INDICATOR = 1 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.PERSON_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT person_id
FROM fact_person_demographics
WHERE worked_any_job_indicator = 1
  AND (worked_on_family_farm_indicator = 1 OR worked_in_animal_care_indicator = 1)
ORDER BY person_id;
raw_output:
SELECT person_id
FROM fact_person_demographics
WHERE worked_any_job_indicator = 1

question: ప్రస్తుతం ఉద్యోగంలో ఉన్న వ్యక్తుల కోసం, వారి పూర్తిచేసిన సగటు విద్యా సంవత్సరాలు మరియు వారి అక్షరాస్యత స్థితిని, గృహప్రముఖుడికి వారి సంబంధం ఆధారంగా వర్గీకరించి, అత్యధిక నుండి అత్యల్ప విద్యా స్థాయికి ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_RELATIONSHIP_TO_HOUSEHOLD_HEAD, AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED), T2.EDUCATION_LITERACY_STATUS FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T2 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T2.PERSON_ID WHERE T1.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = '1' GROUP BY T1.PERSON_RELATIONSHIP_TO_HOUSEHOLD_HEAD, T2.EDUCATION_LITERACY_STATUS ORDER BY AVG(T2.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    person_relationship_to_household_head,
    AVG(education_years_completed) AS average_education_years,
    education_literacy_status,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(education_years_completed) DESC) AS education_rank
FROM fact_person_demographics fpd
JOIN fact_person_education fpe ON fpd.person_id = fpe.person_id
WHERE worked_any_job_indicator = 1
GROUP BY person_relationship_to_household_head, education_literacy_status
ORDER BY average_education_years DESC;

question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
సగటు నెలసరి తలసరి వినియోగం 996 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న గ్రామీణ జిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి రాష్ట్రాలను గుర్తించండి, మరియు 0 నుండి 14 సంవత్సరాల వయస్సు గల పిల్లల మొత్తం సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) < 996 ORDER BY SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    g.district,
    g.state,
    SUM(fhc.household_children_0_to_14_count) AS total_children_0_to_14
FROM
    dim_geography g
    JOIN fact_household_composition fhc ON g.geography_id = fhc.geography_id
    JOIN fact_household_poverty_metrics fhpm ON fhc.household_id = fhpm.household_id
WHERE
    g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY
    g.district,
    g.state
HAVING
    AVG(fhpm.monthly_consumption_per_capita) < 996
ORDER BY
    total_children_0_to_14 DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT
    g.district,
    g.state,
    SUM(fhc.household_children_0_to_14_count) AS total_children_0_to_14
FROM
    dim_geography g
    JOIN fact_household_composition fhc ON g.geography_id = fhc.geography_id
    JOIN fact_household_poverty_metrics fhpm ON fhc.household_id = fhpm.household_id
WHERE
    g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY
    g.district,
    g.state
HAVING
    AVG(fhpm.monthly_consumption_per_capita) < 996
ORDER BY
    total_children_0_to_14 DESC;

question:

పేదరిక రేఖకు పైన నివసించే గ్రామీణ కుటుంబాలు ఉన్న, కానీ పేదరిక రేఖకు పైన నివసించే ఏ ఊరు కుటుంబాలు లేని జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.district
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_household_composition fhc ON dg.geography_id = fhc.geography_id
JOIN fact_household_poverty_metrics fhpm ON fhc.household_id = fhpm.household_id
WHERE dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY dg.district
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN fhpm.below_poverty_line_indicator ILIKE 'no' THEN 1 END) > 0
   AND COUNT(CASE WHEN fhpm.below_poverty_line_indicator ILIKE 'yes' THEN 1 END) = 0;

FROM dim_geography dg

WHERE dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag ILIKE 'rural'
